languages.text: "Мы наладим поставки человеческого мяса с миров-тюрем. Смертники и прочие расходные элементы подойдут идеально".

traits.locale_text: "Мы наладим поставки человеческого мяса с миров-тюрем. Смертники и прочие расходные элементы подойдут идеально".
"Мы наладим поставки человеческого мяса с миров-тюрем. Смертники и прочие расходные элементы подойдут идеально".

languages.text: "We will establish a supply of human flesh from prison worlds. The condemned and the expendable will suit your needs perfectly."
languages.original_text: "Мы наладим поставки человеческого мяса с миров-тюрем. Смертники и прочие расходные элементы подойдут идеально".

traits.locale_text: "We will establish a supply of human flesh from prison worlds. The condemned and the expendable will suit your needs perfectly."
"We will establish a supply of human flesh from prison worlds. The condemned and the expendable will suit your needs perfectly."
"We will establish a supply of human flesh from prison worlds. The condemned and the expendable will suit your needs perfectly."

languages.text: "Wir werden eine Versorgung mit Menschenfleisch aus den Gefängniswelten aufbauen. Die Verurteilten und Entbehrlichen werden eurem Bedarf perfekt entsprechen."
languages.original_text: "We will establish a supply of human flesh from prison worlds. The condemned and the expendable will suit your needs perfectly."

languages.text: "Nous nous approvisionnerons en chair humaine dans les mondes prisonniers. Les condamnés et les sacrifiables répondront parfaitement à vos besoins."
languages.original_text: "We will establish a supply of human flesh from prison worlds. The condemned and the expendable will suit your needs perfectly."

languages.text: "我们将从监狱世界获取人肉" "We will establish a supply of human flesh from prison worlds.死刑犯和可牺牲品完全能满足你们的需求"
languages.original_text: "We will establish a supply of human flesh from prison worlds. The condemned and the expendable will suit your needs perfectly."

languages.text: "Estableceremos un suministro de carne humana de los mundos prisión. Los condenados y los prescindibles se adaptarán perfectamente a sus necesidades".
languages.original_text: "We will establish a supply of human flesh from prison worlds. The condemned and the expendable will suit your needs perfectly."

languages.text: 「刑務所の世界から人肉を供給する。死刑囚や消耗品はあなたのニーズにぴったりです"
languages.original_text: "We will establish a supply of human flesh from prison worlds. The condemned and the expendable will suit your needs perfectly."

languages.text: "Hapishane dünyalarından insan eti tedarik edeceğiz. Mahkûmlar ve harcanabilir olanlar ihtiyaçlarınızı mükemmel bir şekilde karşılayacaktır."
languages.original_text: "We will establish a supply of human flesh from prison worlds. The condemned and the expendable will suit your needs perfectly."
